🔖 Save Resource Bookmarklet

Drag the button below to your bookmarks bar. Then whenever you find a useful woodworking page, click it to save it to JDH Woodworks.

1 Drag this to your bookmarks bar

📚 Save to Workshop

On Mac: drag it to the bookmarks bar. On Windows: right-click and choose "Add to favorites".

2 Use it on any page

Navigate to any woodworking resource — article, video, supplier — and click the bookmarklet. It opens JDH Woodworks and pre-fills the title and URL for you to save.

3 Name and categorize

You can edit the title and pick a category (Finishing, Joinery, Wood Species, Tools, etc.) before saving.
